conflict: Earlier lightweight canonical docs can conflict with the new top skeleton
preferred_resolution: Top skeleton wins and lower docs become subordinate or reference

conflict: Structural metrics can improve while player feel regresses
preferred_resolution: Player-experience gates veto structural-only wins and the constitution now explicitly anchors that rule

conflict: The loop runner may not yet consume active player bottleneck strongly enough
preferred_resolution: Wire loop decision inputs to player-experience metrics outputs

preferred_resolution: Root skeleton files override document-canon descriptions when they differ

preferred_resolution: Keep the linkage explicit in the constitution and treat missing linkage as an authority defect
